# gpssampling

A Shiny application for geospatial sampling of building structures
within defined polygon areas. Supports quadrat, T-square, and random
sampling methods with OpenStreetMap and Google satellite imagery
integration for field epidemiology surveys.

> **Disclaimer:** This package is a fork of the original
> [GeoSampler](https://apps.msf.net/geosampler/site/index.html) package
> developed by Epicentre (MSF). It has been reverse-engineered and
> modified with the help of a Claude AI agent for internal use only.
> This fork is **not** affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by the
> original authors.

## Installation

### System prerequisites

**R \>= 4.3.1** plus system libraries for spatial packages (`sf`,
`terra`, `gdal`, `geos`, `proj`).

Ubuntu / Debian:

``` bash
sudo apt-get install -y \
  libcurl4-openssl-dev libssl-dev libxml2-dev \
  libgdal-dev libgeos-dev libproj-dev libudunits2-dev \
  libsqlite3-dev libfontconfig1-dev libfreetype6-dev \
  libharfbuzz-dev libfribidi-dev libpng-dev libtiff-dev libjpeg-dev
```

macOS (Homebrew):

``` bash
brew install gdal geos proj udunits
```

### Install from GitHub

``` r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("epicentre-msf/gpssampling")
```

### Install from a local clone

``` bash
git clone https://github.com/epicentre-msf/gpssampling.git
R CMD INSTALL gpssampling
```

Or from within R:

``` r
devtools::install("path/to/gpssampling")
```

## Usage

``` r
library(gpssampling)
samp <- sampler()
samp$launch()
```

## Programmatic Sampling Pipeline

In addition to the Shiny app, the package provides a scripted sampling
pipeline for reproducible workflows:

``` r
library(gpssampling)
library(sf)

# Fetch buildings, filter, crop to communities
buildings_list <- fetch_osm_buildings(st_read("boundary.gpkg")) |>
  filter_buildings() |>
  crop_buildings(st_read("communities.gpkg"), community_id_col = "name")

# Sample with minimum-distance constraints
# joint = TRUE draws primary + secondary together (less clustered)
samples <- sample_communities(
  buildings_list,
  n_required = c(community_1 = 30, community_2 = 80),
  min_distance = 50,
  seed = 250292L,
  joint = TRUE
)

# Batch, export (GPX + GeoPackage + OsmAnd tiles), and map
# Use a single integer for uniform batches, or a named vector per community:
batched <- split_batches(samples, n_batches = 5L, set = "primary")
# batched <- split_batches(samples, n_batches = c(community_1 = 5, community_2 = 3), set = "primary")
export_points(batched, out_dir = "output", set = "primary")
map_all_communities(samples, communities, out_dir = "output/maps")

# Interactive leaflet map with buildings, roads, and navigation
leaflet_communities(
  batched, communities,
  buildings_list = buildings_cropped,
  roads_list = fetch_community_roads(communities, road_dir = "output/roads"),
  out_file = "output/maps/map.html"
)
```

See
[`vignette("sampling-pipeline")`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/articles/sampling-pipeline.md)
for the full guide.

## Configuration

### Map tile API keys (optional)

The app works out of the box with free map providers (OpenStreetMap,
ESRI World Imagery, Maxar). For additional basemap options, configure
API keys in your `~/.Renviron` file:

| Provider    | Env variable          | Free tier                   | Get a key                                                                 |
|-------------|-----------------------|-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Google Maps | `MAPS_API_KEY_GOOGLE` | 28 000 map loads/month      | [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials) |
| Mapbox      | `MAPS_API_KEY_MAPBOX` | 200 000 tile requests/month | [Mapbox tokens](https://account.mapbox.com/access-tokens/)                |
| Bing Maps   | `MAPS_API_KEY_BING`   | 125 000 sessions/year       | [Bing Maps Portal](https://www.bingmapsportal.com/Application)            |
| Maxar       | `MAPS_API_KEY_MAXAR`  | Built-in default key        | Override with your own                                                    |

Only basemap options with valid API keys appear in the layer switcher.
Building detection works without any API keys.

### Logging

Logging is powered by `log4r`. Configure via environment variables (in
`~/.Renviron` or at runtime):

| Variable                 | Default  | Description                                              |
|--------------------------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| `GPSSAMPLING_LOG_LEVEL`  | `DEBUG`  | Log threshold: `DEBUG`, `INFO`, `WARN`, `ERROR`, `FATAL` |
| `GPSSAMPLING_LOG_FORMAT` | `text`   | Set to `json` for structured JSON log output             |
| `GPSSAMPLING_LOG_DIR`    | *(none)* | Directory for persistent log files (with rotation)       |

Example:

``` bash
# In ~/.Renviron
GPSSAMPLING_LOG_LEVEL=INFO
GPSSAMPLING_LOG_DIR=~/gpssampling-logs
```

### Mergin integration (optional)

The package includes utilities for syncing projects with a
[Mergin](https://merginmaps.com/) server (Windows only, requires
`mergin.exe`). Configure via environment variables:

| Variable          | Default                   | Description             |
|-------------------|---------------------------|-------------------------|
| `MERGIN_URL`      | `https://mergin.msf.net/` | Mergin server URL       |
| `MERGIN_USER`     | *(required)*              | Mergin account username |
| `MERGIN_PASSWORD` | *(required)*              | Mergin account password |

### Method tracing

For debugging, enable method-level tracing to log every R6 method call
with timing:

``` r
options(gpssampling.trace = TRUE)
samp <- sampler()
samp$launch()
```

Or enable per-instance:

``` r
samp <- sampler(.trace = TRUE)
```

## Development

Development happens on the `dev` branch:

``` bash
git clone https://github.com/epicentre-msf/gpssampling.git
cd gpssampling
git checkout dev
```

**Branch workflow:**

- `dev` — active development, CI runs R-CMD-check on push
- `main` — stable releases, protected branch, auto-release on push

## Warnings

1.  **No warranty.** This package is provided “as is”. AI-assisted
    modifications have not been reviewed by the original developers.
2.  **Not for production.** Intended for internal exploration and
    learning. Do not use for critical field operations without
    independent validation.
3.  **Sampling accuracy.** Results have not been independently verified.
    Cross-check against the official GeoSampler application.
4.  **Data integrity.** Data is stored locally via SQLite. No guarantees
    on persistence across versions.
5.  **Security.** SQL injection vulnerabilities have been patched, but a
    full audit has not been performed. Do not expose to untrusted
    networks.
6.  **Dependencies.** Several private GitHub dependencies have been
    replaced with internal bridge implementations that may not cover all
    edge cases.
7.  **No support.** Refer to the [official GeoSampler
    documentation](https://apps.msf.net/geosampler/site/index.html) for
    help.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`GpsSampler`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/GpsSampler.md)
  : GpsSampler R6 Class

- [`addBreak()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addBreak.md)
  : Add a break to a rdocx element

- [`addCustomControl()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addCustomControl.md)
  : Add a custom control to a Leaflet map.

- [`addGoogleTiles()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addGoogleTiles.md)
  : Adds Google Tiles Layer

- [`addNewLine()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addNewLine.md)
  : Add new line to rdocx element

- [`addPaintPolygonControl()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addPaintPolygonControl.md)
  : Add a PaintPolygon Control

- [`addRoofsGoogle()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addRoofsGoogle.md)
  : Add Roofs using Google Maps API

- [`addSidebar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addSidebar.md)
  : Add a Sidebar Leaflet Control

- [`addStarsImage()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/addStarsImage.md)
  : Add stars layer to a leaflet map

- [`adf()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/adf.md)
  :

  bash alias for
  [`as.data.frame`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/as.data.frame.html)

- [`button()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/button.md)
  : Create a button widget

- [`buttonLoading()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/buttonLoading.md)
  : Create a button with optional loading state and loading label

- [`calculateSampleZeroInflatedDistribution()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/calculateSampleZeroInflatedDistribution.md)
  : Calculate Sample Zero-Inflated Distribution

- [`catf()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/catf.md)
  : Logging

- [`checkPort()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/checkPort.md)
  : Function to check if a port is open on localhost

- [`closeSidebar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/closeSidebar.md)
  : Close the Sidebar

- [`create_buffer_tiles()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/create_buffer_tiles.md)
  : Create SQLite tile overlay for OsmAnd

- [`create_buffers()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/create_buffers.md)
  : Create circular buffers around points

- [`create_earth_project()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/create_earth_project.md)
  : Create a Google Earth (KML) project

- [`crop_buildings()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/crop_buildings.md)
  : Crop buildings to community polygons

- [`email_points()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/email_points.md)
  : Send exported zip files via email

- [`export_points()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/export_points.md)
  : Export sample points, buffers, and tile overlays

- [`fetch_community_roads()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/fetch_community_roads.md)
  : Fetch OSM roads for all communities

- [`fetch_osm_buildings()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/fetch_osm_buildings.md)
  : Fetch OSM building footprints

- [`filter_buildings()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/filter_buildings.md)
  : Filter building footprints by type

- [`findFreePort()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/findFreePort.md)
  : Find a free port to use

- [`find_start_points()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/find_start_points.md)
  : Find buildings closest to roads

- [`getChoices()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/getChoices.md)
  : Get choices for labelling

- [`getTablePorts()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/getTablePorts.md)
  : Get table of listening TCP ports

- [`info()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/info.md)
  :

  bash alias for
  [`sessionInfo`](https://rdrr.io/r/utils/sessionInfo.html)

- [`launcher()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/launcher.md)
  : Create a launcher on the desktop for Windows (.bat), Mac (.command),
  or Linux (.sh)

- [`leaflet_communities()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/leaflet_communities.md)
  : Interactive leaflet map of all communities

- [`lin_launcher()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/lin_launcher.md)
  : Create a launcher and updater for Linux (.sh)

- [`mac_launcher()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/mac_launcher.md)
  : Create a launcher and updater for Mac (.command)

- [`map_all_communities()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/map_all_communities.md)
  : Generate all maps and optionally save to files

- [`map_community()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/map_community.md)
  : Create a static map for one community

- [`map_cropped_buildings()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/map_cropped_buildings.md)
  : Map cropped buildings per community

- [`map_overview()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/map_overview.md)
  : Create an overview map of all communities

- [`matchValue()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/matchValue.md)
  : Function: matchValue

- [`modalDialog()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/modalDialog.md)
  : Modal Dialog

- [`openSidebar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/openSidebar.md)
  : Open the Sidebar by ID

- [`pageNavbar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/pageNavbar.md)
  : Page Navbar

- [`page_navbar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/page_navbar.md)
  : Page Navbar

- [`paste_ignore_NA()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/paste_ignore_NA.md)
  : Paste Strings with Ignoring NA Values

- [`progressBar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/progressBar.md)
  : Create a progress bar

- [`progressDone()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/progressDone.md)
  : Progress Done

- [`progressUpdate()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/progressUpdate.md)
  : Updates the progress bar

- [`promptChoice()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/promptChoice.md)
  : This function prompts the user to choose from a list of options.

- [`radians()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/radians.md)
  : Convert angle from degrees to radians

- [`radioGroupButtons()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/radioGroupButtons.md)
  : Radio Group Buttons

- [`readBasemapGoogle()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/readBasemapGoogle.md)
  : Read Google Maps basemap tiles for given polygons

- [`removeSidebar()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/removeSidebar.md)
  : Remove the Sidebar

- [`replace()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/replace.md)
  : Replace text in a file

- [`sample_communities()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/sample_communities.md)
  : Sample buildings across communities

- [`sampler()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/sampler.md)
  : Create a GPS sampler instance

- [`setStyle()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/setStyle.md)
  : Efficiently style a group that has already been added to the map

- [`shinyAppMinimal()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/shinyAppMinimal.md)
  : shinyAppMinimal

- [`sidebar_pane()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/sidebar_pane.md)
  : Create a Sidebar Pane

- [`sidebar_tabs()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/sidebar_tabs.md)
  : Create a Sidebar

- [`split_batches()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/split_batches.md)
  : Split sample points into batches

- [`strReplaceAll()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/strReplaceAll.md)
  :

  Wrapper function for string replacement using
  `[stringr::str_replace_all()]`

- [`theme()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/theme.md)
  : Theme function for customizing Bootstrap themes

- [`useEvents()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/useEvents.md)
  : Add JS code Straight to your app (instead of a dependency)

- [`useGoogle()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/useGoogle.md)
  : User functions :

- [`useWaiter()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/useWaiter.md)
  : Use Waiter and Waitress in Shiny app

- [`utils`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/utils.md)
  : Functions usefull

- [`win_launcher()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/win_launcher.md)
  : Create a launcher and updater for Windows (.bat)

- [`zip_points()`](https://epicentre-msf.github.io/gpssampling/reference/zip_points.md)
  : Create zip archives for field distribution
